phase_5.reason: End-to-end LLOYD verification gate. Confirms the predecessor WO's promise (unified pipeline works end-to-end on external project) is fulfilled.

history.note: Successor to WO-UNIFIED-CODEREF-PIPELINE-001. Bundles the 3 follow-ups recorded in P6-VERIFICATION.md (SQLite --reset bug, rag-index exit-code semantics, Python chunk-conversion skip). Plan-type phased; 5 phases including 1 hard stop at end.

history.rationale: Multi-phase, three distinct deliverables, public CLI surface touched, no policy gates.

handoff.note: Begin with Phase 1 reproduction baseline. Phase 5 is the hard stop.
